details.attacks: 4 x weapon (1d8 by fist or weapon)
details.special: PSI: WT: Know Direction, All-Round Vision Powers: 2 Multi-arm Defense: Whenever a B’rogh is not attacking with any pair of hands, it gains -2[+2] AC for each pair. Multi Attacks: B’rogh can attack up to four times, but after their second attack each subsequent attack will get a -2 penalty to their attack roll. ● False appearance: While they remain immobile, cacti seem indistinguishable from other

system.description:
B'rohg are giant, slime-covered humanoids native to the wastes of Athas.

Psionics: WT: Know Direction, All-Round Vision Powers: 2 Multi-arm Defense: Whenever a B’rogh is not attacking with any pair of hands, it gains -2[+2] AC for each pair.
